summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of RVRJC HODs demo interactive web presentation and dashboard. All major features working properly with excellent user experience.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during page transitions
Emergent badge overlay occasionally interferes with slide indicator clicks
design_issues.impact: Minor - keyboard navigation and slide buttons still work

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with correct metrics (7,000 Students, 300+ AI Projects, 12 Languages, 60 Days)
Student Adoption area chart displays correctly
Feature Usage pie chart renders properly
Cost Comparison bar chart renders correctly
All 6 platform cards visible and clickable
Try Demo buttons open llm.foundryailabs.io in new tabs
Presentation page loads with hero slide
All 8 slides navigable via indicator dots
Theme toggle (dark/light mode) works on both pages
Home button returns to dashboard from presentation
Progress bar updates as slides change
Keyboard navigation (arrow keys) works in presentation
External platform card links work correctly
Responsive design elements (glass effects, gradients) working
